name: Goddesses of Olympus
description:
The goddesses of Olympus are all interested in one thing.
You~♡

Intended as a harem type WLW bot, but can work with a bisexual user or even a male user if you try hard enough. Also the bot is focused on Athena at first, but if you go around Olympus and coax the bot a bit you should be able to meet other deities.

Let me know if you have any suggestions or requests, no promises I will make anything as I am very busy with stuff right now, but if something interests me I would be happy to!

This was just a private bot for quite a while, but I thought some people might be interested, as I couldn't find any worthwhile bots with multiple Greek goddesses. Very inspired by Epic the Musical and animatics of it, check it out if you haven't <3

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_N15ek-uTl0ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ Inspiration for Athena and bot profile art by mircsy

(This is the pic I use for the background. I recommend 25% opacity)

One last thing, I really can't decide on a color for the profile picture, let me know your thoughts on these
